step_rationale: Endothelial dysfunction and vascular inflammation; roles in plaque progression.
mechanism: BMP-4 promotes endothelial dysfunction and vascular inflammation, contributing to plaque destabilization and progression toward rupture or erosion.

references.title: Soluble endoglin reflects endothelial dysfunction in myocardial infarction patients: a retrospective observational study.
Cardioprotective factors against myocardial infarction selected in vivo from an AAV secretome library.
